data.title: IdaCorp Engages Analysts Amid Leadership Transition
data.description:
IdaCorp ( (IDA) ) has issued an update.

Judith A. Johansen announced her retirement from the boards of IDACORP and Idaho Power, effective December 31, 2025, after serving since 2007. Her departure marks a significant change in the company’s leadership, potentially impacting its strategic direction and governance. IDACORP is actively engaging with financial analysts and the investment community, sharing insights into its operations and future plans, which include a robust capital expenditure strategy aimed at supporting growth and maintaining customer affordability.

The most recent analyst rating on (IDA) stock is a Hold with a $137.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IdaCorp stock, see the IDA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IDA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IDA is a Neutral.

IdaCorp’s overall stock score reflects strong financial performance and positive earnings call highlights, such as increased earnings per share and customer base growth. However, increased leverage, negative free cash flow, and regulatory challenges weigh on the score. The technical indicators suggest a stable outlook, while the valuation is moderate.

To see Spark’s full report on IDA stock, click here.

More about IdaCorp

IDACORP, Inc. is a vertically integrated energy company with a focus on electric utility services. It operates primarily through its subsidiary, Idaho Power Company, serving approximately 650,000 customers across a 24,000 square mile area. The company boasts a generation and storage capacity of 3.8 GW and has a strong financial standing with a revenue of $1.83 billion and a return on average equity of 9.3%. IDACORP is committed to transitioning its remaining coal operations to natural gas by 2030 and maintains customer rates significantly below the national average.

data.title: Advanced Biomed Launches A+PerfusC™ Platform
data.description:
The latest update is out from Advanced Biomed Inc. ( (ADVB) ).

On September 19, 2025, Advanced Biomed Inc. announced the launch of A+PerfusC™, an integrated perfusion 3D cell culture platform designed for precision medicine and drug discovery. This system replicates human physiological conditions in vitro, supporting continuous culture and enhancing cell viability and drug response predictability. The platform’s potential applications include personalized oncology research, drug screening, and regenerative medicine. The company plans to scale up the system for high-throughput use and integrate AI-driven analytics, aiming to accelerate tumor profiling and advance personalized treatment development.

More about Advanced Biomed Inc.

Advanced Biomed Inc. is a Nevada-incorporated holding company specializing in innovative biomedical technologies for cancer detection and precision medicine. Operating through subsidiaries in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Mainland China, the company has developed a proprietary microfluidic platform that integrates semiconductor and biotechnology to enable advanced circulating tumor cell detection, enrichment, and analysis. Its portfolio includes devices and biochips designed for cancer screening, diagnosis, treatment selection, and prognosis assessment, with regulatory clearances in progress in China and plans for future global expansion.

Average Trading Volume: 941,019

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Vestand Inc Acquires Controlling Interest in AI Mindbot
data.description:
Vestand Inc Class A ( (VSTD) ) has issued an update.

On September 15, 2025, Vestand’s subsidiary, Vestand Korea Company Limited, entered an agreement to acquire a controlling interest in AI Mindbot Equity, the largest shareholder of Xcure Corp., a Kosdaq-listed company specializing in smart card and mobile security platform technology. This acquisition is part of Vestand’s crypto treasury strategy, establishing a strategic bridge between the crypto treasury markets of the United States and Korea. The transaction positions Vestand to implement its global crypto treasury strategy and redefines its market perception from a simple coin-holding company to a growth-oriented entity. The acquisition is expected to provide a new valuation premium in the KOSDAQ market and enhance Vestand’s positioning as a unique model with expanding treasury, stable cash flow, and a growth-oriented platform business.

data.description:

Lichen International Limited has undergone significant changes in 2025, including acquiring the remaining equity of Bondly Enterprises Limited, a professional education business, and selling its education services company, Lichen Education. Despite these strategic moves, the company reported a net loss of $9.18 million for the first half of 2025, compared to a net income of $767,000 in the same period of 2024. The company’s shift towards IPO advisory services and external equity investments marks a strategic pivot in its business operations.
